form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when she got back too far over 411m at Casino. Prior to that won by 2.5 lengths at Q Parklands (41.50) beating Mondo Cortez in a Grade 5 on March 12. Yet to be beaten in three starts out of this draw. Sure to go well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a OPEN on April 11 over 457m at this track behind Scrub's Blue beaten 4.5 lengths (25.70). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching five minors in a row. Aided by a low draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 460m in 26.01. Followed that up with a minor placing over 366m at Capalaba at Grade 5 two weeks ago. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on April 14 over 450m at Grafton behind Firethorn, beaten 7 lengths (25.47) in a Grade 4/5. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (25.65) at big odds over 457m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at this track over 390m (21.72) beating Another Idea in Grade 3/4 on April 10. Can make it two on the bounce.
